notes: Traces the photo's mantle silhouettes recognizably but drops one of the four squid, omits arm/tentacle definition, and retains noisy specular-highlight fragments that read as photo-trace clutter rather than FAO scientific restraint.
specific_issues: only 3 mantles rendered though input photo shows 4 squid
arms and tentacles essentially absent — no ring suckers, no club definition
eyes are tiny dot-pupils rather than the clear almond-with-pupil FAO convention
interior littered with broken short strokes traced from wet specular highlights
no fin outlines distinguishable from mantle
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields matching the photo
outline broken/fragmented in places along mantle edges
head/arm-crown region reduced to a few squiggles instead of articulated anatomy
